title: Jamaican Gelatine Leaves En-Croute
description: A rich, fluffy, and comforting Jamaican dish featuring gelatine leaves, perfect for a quick lacto-vegetarian meal or snack.
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine the gruel and water and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, combine the coconut milk, gruel mixture, rum, brown sugar, butter, Jamaican curry powder, sea salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and sprinkle with gelatine leaves.
Cover with foil and cook for 15 minutes or until the gelatine leaves are soft.
After 15 minutes, carefully remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes or until a light golden brown.
Let cool and serve in individual portions.
Note: Do not overbake as this may cause the gelatine to break down.
Alternatively, if you can not get gelatine leaves, you can use traditional gelatin powder as a substitute.
If using gelatin powder, follow the package instructions for proper mixing with hot water before using.
